TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tabaku, title = tabaku, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tabaku} }

S.FORM: == tabaku == u tabaku sa, cikciken tu pahpah nu tabaku a nipaluma. tabuen tu tatipeluk. tanaya' sa 12cm, kimulumuluan. anu mitabaku sa, patuduhan i ayaw, cepcepan i zikuz. palikaten tu lamal i ayaw. naayaw ku Yincumin, plaluma kya tabaku a nipaluma i luma' i laku'. u sulit nu Hulam . u sulit nu Amilika A cigarette, or cigaret, is a small cylinder of finely cut tobacco leaves rolled in thin paper for smoking. The cigarette is ignited at one end causing the cigarette to smoulder and allowing smoke to be inhaled from the other end, which is held in or to the mouth; in some cases, a cigarette holder may be used, as well. Most modern manufactured cigarettes are filtered, and also include reconstituted tobacco and other additives. u sapuelac nu masatekeday a sulit patabaku: ŚéĽśäĹŤŹł mitabaku: Śú®śäĹŤŹł mitabakuay: Śú®śäĹŤŹłÁöĄ tinaku ku kamu u Sakizaya (patabaku) patabaku cisaydang aku (mitabaku) Mitabaku auk aku (mitabakuay) lumeni' ku bala' nu mitabakuay. malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganňź
S.PHON: == tabaku == u tabaku sa, ¶ik ¶ik…ôn tu pańßpańß nu tabaku a nipar~…ĺuma. tabu…ôn tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. tanaja Ē~ ° sa ** ¶m, kimur~…ĺumur~…ĺuan. anu mitabaku sa, patuduńßan i ajaw, ¶…ôp ¶…ôpan i zikuz. par~…ĺikat…ôn tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ i ajaw. naajaw ku jin ¶umin, pr~…ĺar~…ĺuma kja tabaku a nipar~…ĺuma i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i r~…ĺaku Ē~ °. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika a ¶igar…ôtt…ô, or ¶igar…ôt, is a smar~…ĺr~…ĺ ¶jr~…ĺind…ôr of fin…ôr~…ĺj ¶ut toba ¶ ¶o r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs ror~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd in tńßin pap…ôr for smokiŇč. tńß…ô ¶igar…ôtt…ô is ignit…ôd at on…ô …ônd ¶ausiŇč tńß…ô ¶igar…ôtt…ô to smour~…ĺd…ôr and ar~…ĺr~…ĺowiŇč smok…ô to b…ô inńßar~…ĺ…ôd from tńß…ô otńß…ôr …ônd, wńßi ¶ńß is ńß…ôr~…ĺd in or to tńß…ô moutńß; in som…ô ¶as…ôs, a ¶igar…ôtt…ô ńßor~…ĺd…ôr maj b…ô us…ôd, as w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ. most mod…ôrn manufa ¶tur…ôd ¶igar…ôtt…ôs ar…ô fir~…ĺt…ôr…ôd, and ar~…ĺso in ¶r~…ĺud…ô r…ô ¶onstitut…ôd toba ¶ ¶o and otńß…ôr additi*…ôs. u sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nu masat…ôk…ôdaj a sur~…ĺit patabaku: *** mitabaku: *** mitabakuaj: **** tinaku ku kamu u sakizaja (patabaku) patabaku ¶isajdaŇč aku (mitabaku) mitabaku auk aku (mitabakuaj) r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu mitabakuaj. mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan*
S.FORM: == tabaku == u tabaku sa, cikciken tu pahpah nu tabaku a nipaluma. tabuen tu tatipeluk. tanaya' sa 12cm, kimulumuluan. anu mitabaku sa, patuduhan i ayaw, cepcepan i zikuz. palikaten tu lamal i ayaw. naayaw ku Yincumin, plaluma kya tabaku a nipaluma i luma' i laku'. u sulit nu Hulam . u sulit nu Amilika A cigarette, or cigaret, is a small cylinder of finely cut tobacco leaves rolled in thin paper for smoking. The cigarette is ignited at one end causing the cigarette to smoulder and allowing smoke to be inhaled from the other end, which is held in or to the mouth; in some cases, a cigarette holder may be used, as well. Most modern manufactured cigarettes are filtered, and also include reconstituted tobacco and other additives. u sapuelac nu masatekeday a sulit patabaku: ŚéĽśäĹŤŹł mitabaku: Śú®śäĹŤŹł mitabakuay: Śú®śäĹŤŹłÁöĄ tinaku ku kamu u Sakizaya (patabaku) patabaku cisaydang aku (mitabaku) Mitabaku auk aku (mitabakuay) lumeni' ku bala' nu mitabakuay. malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinenganňź
S.PHON: == tabaku == u tabaku sa, ¶ik ¶ik…ôn tu pańßpańß nu tabaku a nipar~…ĺuma. tabu…ôn tu tatip…ôr~…ĺuk. tanaja Ē~ ° sa ** ¶m, kimur~…ĺumur~…ĺuan. anu mitabaku sa, patuduńßan i ajaw, ¶…ôp ¶…ôpan i zikuz. par~…ĺikat…ôn tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ i ajaw. naajaw ku jin ¶umin, pr~…ĺar~…ĺuma kja tabaku a nipar~…ĺuma i r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i r~…ĺaku Ē~ °. u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam . u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika a ¶igar…ôtt…ô, or ¶igar…ôt, is a smar~…ĺr~…ĺ ¶jr~…ĺind…ôr of fin…ôr~…ĺj ¶ut toba ¶ ¶o r~…ĺ…ôa*…ôs ror~…ĺr~…ĺ…ôd in tńßin pap…ôr for smokiŇč. tńß…ô ¶igar…ôtt…ô is ignit…ôd at on…ô …ônd ¶ausiŇč tńß…ô ¶igar…ôtt…ô to smour~…ĺd…ôr and ar~…ĺr~…ĺowiŇč smok…ô to b…ô inńßar~…ĺ…ôd from tńß…ô otńß…ôr …ônd, wńßi ¶ńß is ńß…ôr~…ĺd in or to tńß…ô moutńß; in som…ô ¶as…ôs, a ¶igar…ôtt…ô ńßor~…ĺd…ôr maj b…ô us…ôd, as w…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ. most mod…ôrn manufa ¶tur…ôd ¶igar…ôtt…ôs ar…ô fir~…ĺt…ôr…ôd, and ar~…ĺso in ¶r~…ĺud…ô r…ô ¶onstitut…ôd toba ¶ ¶o and otńß…ôr additi*…ôs. u sapu…ôr~…ĺa ¶ nu masat…ôk…ôdaj a sur~…ĺit patabaku: *** mitabaku: *** mitabakuaj: **** tinaku ku kamu u sakizaja (patabaku) patabaku ¶isajdaŇč aku (mitabaku) mitabaku auk aku (mitabakuaj) r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ ° ku bar~…ĺa Ē~ ° nu mitabakuaj. mar~…ĺaar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan*
